items.summary: The Royals lost to the Texas Rangers, KC 1, TEX 9. Vinnie Pasquantino led the night, 2-3 | BB, RBI in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 112.8 mph.
items.title: Royals at Rangers Recap
